specific_mechanism: RAMSEY-CASCADE: Ramsey-number-based attention head allocation for information cascade
llm_application: For an N-token sequence, allocate attention heads so that for every pair of tokens, there's a monochromatic path of length R(2,k) (forced by Ramsey theorem); use as guaranteed-coverage routing.
novelty_claim: Distinct from R679 Brun sieve information-cascade.
sub_mechanisms: M_2 head colorings as edge labels
